content.intro: The move-in process covers everything from reference completion to handing over keys. PropertyGoose tracks pending move-ins on your dashboard calendar and helps ensure nothing is missed.

steps.title: Complete references
steps.content: Ensure all tenant references are complete and approved before proceeding.

steps.title: Collect initial monies
steps.content: Request and confirm receipt of the deposit, first month's rent, and any rent up front.

steps.title: Protect the deposit
steps.content: Register the deposit with a protection scheme within 30 days and send prescribed information.

steps.title: Sign tenancy agreement
steps.content: Generate and have all parties sign the AST agreement.

steps.title: Prepare compliance docs
steps.content: Gather Gas Safety Certificate, EPC, EICR, and How to Rent guide to provide to tenants.

steps.title: Conduct inventory
steps.content: Complete a detailed inventory check-in report with the tenant present.

steps.title: Take meter readings
steps.content: Record gas, electric, and water meter readings and notify suppliers of the change.

steps.title: Hand over keys
steps.content: Provide all keys and access devices, noting quantities in your records.

steps.title: Provide documents
steps.content: Give the tenant copies of all compliance documents and the How to Rent guide.

sections.title: Dashboard Calendar
sections.content: The dashboard calendar shows all upcoming move-ins. Click on a date to see which tenancies are starting and what's still pending.

sections.title: Updating Move-In Dates
sections.content: If the move-in date changes, you can update it from the reference or tenancy detail page. The calendar will automatically reflect the new date.
